text: I have a vivid imagination.
I enjoy daydreaming about things that could never happen.
I spend a lot of time thinking about 'what if' scenarios.
I believe that art is an important part of life.
I am deeply moved by music and visual arts.
I enjoy visiting art galleries and museums.
I experience my emotions very intensely.
I often notice how other people are feeling.
I am very in touch with my own inner feelings.
I am always eager to try new and exotic food.
I enjoy traveling to places I've never been before.
I like to try out new hobbies and activities frequently.
I love to read challenging books and articles.
I enjoy solving complex problems and puzzles.
I am curious about how the world works.
I enjoy hearing different perspectives, even if they challenge my own.
I believe that rules should be questioned and improved.
I am open to changing my mind when I learn new information.
I am confident in my ability to handle unexpected challenges.
I believe I can achieve the goals I set for myself.
I feel capable of managing my daily responsibilities effectively.
I like to keep my workspace and home very organized.
I follow a set schedule for most of my activities.
I prefer to have everything in its proper place.
I take my obligations and commitments very seriously.
I always try to do the right thing, even when it is difficult.
I am a person who can always be counted on.
I work hard to be the best in whatever I do.
I set high standards for my personal and professional life.
I am driven to achieve significant success.
I can focus on a task for a long time without getting distracted.
I am good at avoiding temptations that interfere with my goals.
I follow through on my plans even when they become difficult.
I carefully weigh my options before making a decision.
I rarely act on impulse without thinking things through.
I prefer to plan ahead to avoid potential problems.
I make friends easily and enjoy meeting new people.
I am warm and approachable in social situations.
I enjoy starting conversations with strangers.
I love being in large groups of people.
I seek out social gatherings and parties.
I feel most energized when I am around others.
I am comfortable taking the lead in a group.
I find it easy to express my opinions, even if others disagree.
I am a person who steps up to take charge when needed.
I lead a very busy and active lifestyle.
I prefer to stay in motion rather than sitting still.
I have a high level of energy throughout the day.
I enjoy high-risk activities and thrilling experiences.
I am always looking for new and exciting adventures.
I get bored easily and need constant stimulation.
I am generally a very happy and optimistic person.
I find it easy to look on the bright side of things.
I enjoy laughing and sharing jokes with others.
I believe that most people are basically honest and good.
I find it easy to trust others until they give me a reason not to.
I generally expect that things will work out well when dealing with others.
I am honest and straightforward in my dealings with others.
I believe it is wrong to take advantage of anyone.
I value integrity and truthfulness above all else.
I genuinely enjoy helping people in need.
I am willing to put others' needs before my own.
I find it rewarding to contribute to my community.
I prefer to collaborate with others rather than compete.
I am willing to compromise to reach a group consensus.
I value harmony and teamwork in my professional life.
I am uncomfortable being the center of attention.
I prefer to let my work speak for itself rather than bragging.
I don't think I am better or more important than anyone else.
I am easily moved by the misfortunes of others.
I feel a deep sense of compassion for people who are suffering.
I care about the well-being of all living things.
I worry about things more than most people do.
I often feel tense or nervous in unfamiliar situations.
I find it difficult to stop worrying about potential problems.
I get irritated easily when things don't go my way.
I find it hard to control my temper when I am frustrated.
I sometimes snap at others when I am under stress.
I often feel down, even without a clear reason.
I find it difficult to feel enthusiastic about my future.
I sometimes feel helpless or discouraged about life.
I am very sensitive to how others perceive me.
I feel self-conscious or awkward in social situations.
I worry about what people are thinking of me.
I have difficulty resisting my cravings or impulses.
I sometimes overindulge in food, shopping, or other pleasures.
I find it hard to maintain self-control in the face of temptation.
I feel overwhelmed when I have to handle too much stress.
I find it difficult to cope with crises or unexpected problems.
I often feel like things are out of my control.
